page_content:
EDSP466 Issues and Models of Instruction: Middle/Secondary Special Education (3 Credits)

Issues, legislation, and service models in middle/secondary special education. Emphasis on career and vocational education, self- determination, and transition.

Restriction: Must be in Special Education program. Jointly offered with EDSP664.

Credit Only Granted for. EDSP466 or EDSP664.

EDSP470 Introduction to Special Education (3 Credits) Designed to give an understanding of the needs of all types of exceptional children.

Restriction: Must not have completed EDSP210.

Credit Only Granted for. EDSP210, EDSP211 or EDSP470.
